creator: tundra@tundraware.com
text:
Here is the corrected patch:

diff -urN /usr/ports/x11-fm/twander/Makefile twander/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/x11-fm/twander/Makefile	2007-06-03 00:05:59.000000000 -0500
+++ twander/Makefile	2009-07-14 12:24:32.000000000 -0500
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #

 PORTNAME=	twander
-PORTVERSION=	3.224
+PORTVERSION=	3.231
 CATEGORIES=	x11-fm
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.tundraware.com/Software/twander/

diff -urN /usr/ports/x11-fm/twander/distinfo twander/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/x11-fm/twander/distinfo	2007-06-03 00:05:59.000000000 -0500
+++ twander/distinfo	2009-07-14 12:25:10.000000000 -0500
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (twander-3.224.tar.gz) = c4229c3623508d683c3e560fd6ef54ae
-SHA256 (twander-3.224.tar.gz) = a83eb6710416bad56f0f109fa70330465ebe2dc4cd396c0f3fa65ed04def69e6
-SIZE (twander-3.224.tar.gz) = 744817
+MD5 (twander-3.231.tar.gz) = 86b22e974d77354fae02b9022547f158
+SHA256 (twander-3.231.tar.gz) = 4fe34c3b61e05efb9129f0b0a5f07fd8509acc5fc4d3a046feefe52ad57d7e1d
+SIZE (twander-3.231.tar.gz) = 750195
